headline: China surpassing Europe in Drug Innovation and Development, Pfizer Inc. (PFE) Executive says
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is among the Best Healthcare Stocks. On June 23, Reuters reported that Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) ‘s Chief International Commercial Officer, Alexandre de Germay, said China has moved ahead of Europe in pharmaceutical innovation and drug development. De Germay commented that China now has “40% of all clinical studies in oncology” globally. He pointed […]

headline: A CFO Departure. A Clinical Miss. A $43 Billion Question Mark. Should You Throw in the Towel on Pfizer Stock?
summary: Things are going from bad to worse for the pharmaceutical giant.
